ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "exe_idno" INTEGER /* ID number of the insurance policy or contract */,
  "shock_scn_cd" INTEGER /* Shock scenario code (e.g., natural disaster, accident) */,
  "kics_ltpf_cd" INTEGER /* KICS long-term policy framework code */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was reported */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., property damage, personal injury, liability) */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "damage_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the damage */,
  "estimated_loss" REAL /* Estimated loss amount */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who reported the claim */,
  "external_data_reference" TEXT /* Reference to external data sources (e.g., weather report ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_exe_idno FOREIGN KEY ("exe_idno") REFERENCES policies ("exe_idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "exe_idno" INTEGER /* ID number of the insurance policy or contract */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy (e.g., auto, home, commercial) */,
  "policy_holder" TEXT /* Name of the policy holder */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the coverage */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy is up for renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exe_idno")
)

CREATE TABLE "reserves" (
  "reserve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reserve calculation */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the reserve */,
  "re_ibnr_amt" REAL /* Incurred but not reported (IBNR) amount */,
  "re_os_amt" REAL /* Outstanding (OS) amount */,
  "re_loss_svyexp" REAL /* Loss survey expense */,
  "re_rsv_lss" REAL /* Reserve loss */,
  "re_tvog_amt" REAL /* Total value of goods (TVog) amount */,
  "re_cebf_amt" REAL /* Case estimate basis factor (CEBF) amount */,
  "re_ce_lss" REAL /* Case estimate loss */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reserve was calculated */,
  "actuary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actuary who calculated the reserve */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any adjustments to the reserve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reserve_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reserves_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investigator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the investigator (e.g., property, auto, fraud) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_investigators" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the investigator was assigned to the claim */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the assignment of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id", "investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status_history" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the claim status was changed */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the claim */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id", "status_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims adjuster, actuary, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., claims, finance, IT) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log event occurred */,
  "log_event" TEXT /* Description of the log event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the log event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
